# status, text + json, with no daemon running.

exec eon status
stdout 'daemon:     stopped'
stdout 'jobs:       total=0'

exec eon status --json
stdout '"running": false'
stdout '"total": 0'
stdout '"db_path"'
stdout '"data_dir"'

# After adding jobs, counts reflect.
exec eon add --cron '@hourly' -- echo a
exec eon add --at '+1h' -- echo b

exec eon status --json
stdout '"total": 2'
stdout '"cron": 1'
stdout '"oneshot_pending": 1'
